{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4843024894782521597
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "[build-system]\nrequires = [\"hatchling>=1.24.0\"]\nbuild-backend = \"hatchling.build\"\n\n[project]\nname = \"mini-celery\"\nversion = \"0.1.0\"\ndescription = \"Local production-style job queue + scheduler using FastAPI, Redis Streams, and SQLite\"\nreadme = \"README.md\"\nrequires-python = \">=3.12\"\nlicense = { text = \"MIT\" }\nauthors = [{ name = \"mini-celery\" }]\ndependencies = [\n  \"fastapi>=0.115.0\",\n  \"uvicorn[standard]>=0.31.0\",\n  \"redis>=5.1.0\",\n  \"SQLAlchemy>=2.0.36\",\n  \"pydantic>=2.9.2\",\n  \"pydantic-settings>=2.6.0\",\n  \"httpx>=0.27.2\",\n  \"prometheus-client>=0.21.0\",\n  \"typer>=0.12.5\",\n  \"croniter>=5.0.1\",\n  \"PyYAML>=6.0.2\"\n]\n\n[project.optional-dependencies]\ndev = [\n  \"pytest>=8.3.3\",\n  \"pytest-asyncio>=0.24.0\",\n  \"pytest-cov>=5.0.0\",\n  \"ruff>=0.8.0\",\n  \"mypy>=1.11.2\",\n  \"types-PyYAML>=6.0.12.20240917\"\n]\n\n[project.scripts]\nmini-celery = \"mini_celery.cli:app\"\n\n[tool.pytest.ini_options]\naddopts = \"-q\"\nasyncio_mode = \"auto\"\nmarkers = [\n  \"integration: marks integration tests\"\n]\n\n[tool.ruff]\nline-length = 100\ntarget-version = \"py312\"\n\n[tool.ruff.lint]\nselect = [\"E\", \"F\", \"I\", \"UP\", \"B\", \"SIM\", \"RUF\"]\n\n[tool.ruff.format]\nquote-style = \"double\"\nindent-style = \"space\"\n\n[tool.mypy]\npython_version = \"3.12\"\nstrict = false\nignore_missing_imports = true\nwarn_unused_ignores = true\nwarn_redundant_casts = true\ndisable_error_code = [\"import-untyped\"]\nexclude = [\"tests/\"]\n\n[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]\npackages = [\"mini_celery\"]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "2c8bbd24354ee1719c873afc376061cd09881b0e45adf7ba45389d338c56520a",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": "."
      },
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport os\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nimport pytest\nimport pytest_asyncio\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\n\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings\nfrom mini_celery.db import Database\nfrom mini_celery.repository import Repository\n\n\nclass FakeBroker:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._counter = 0\n        self.enqueued: list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]] = []\n        self.acked: list[tuple[str, str]] = []\n\n    async def ensure_consumer_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        _ = queue\n\n    async def enqueue(self, queue: str, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        self._counter += 1\n        stream_id = f\"{self._counter}-0\"\n        self.enqueued.append((queue, dict(fields)))\n        return stream_id\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        _ = (queue, consumer, count, block_ms)\n        return []\n\n    async def ack(self, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        self.acked.append((queue, stream_id))\n        return 1\n\n    async def claim_stale(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        min_idle_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        _ = (queue, consumer, min_idle_ms, count)\n        return []\n\n    async def queue_depth(self, queue: str) -> int:\n        _ = queue\n        return 0\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        _ = fields\n        self._counter += 1\n        return f\"dlq-{self._counter}-0\"\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        return True\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        return None\n\n\\REDACTED\ndef database(tmp_path: Path) -> Database:\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"mini_celery_test.db\"\n    db = Database(f\"sqlite:///{db_path.as_posix()}\")\n    db.init()\n    return db\n\n\\REDACTED\ndef repo(database: Database) -> Repository:\n    return Repository(database.SessionLocal)\n\n\\REDACTED\ndef settings(database: Database) -> Settings:\n    return Settings(\n        database_url=str(database.engine.url),\n        redis_url=os.getenv(\"REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/15\"),\n        worker_queues=\"default\",\n        default_queue=\"default\",\n        visibility_timeout_sec=1,\n        reclaim_interval_sec=1,\n        scheduler_poll_interval_sec=0.2,\n    )\n\n\\REDACTED\ndef fake_broker() -> FakeBroker:\n    return FakeBroker()\n\n\n@pytest_asyncio.fixture\nasync def redis_client() -> Redis:\n    redis_url = os.getenv(\"REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/15\")\n    client = Redis.from_url(redis_url, decode_responses=True)\n    try:\n        await client.ping()\n    except Exception:\n        pytest.skip(\"Redis not available for integration tests\")\n\n    await client.flushdb()\n    try:\n        yield client\n    finally:\n        await client.flushdb()\n        await client.aclose()\n\n\\REDACTED\ndef integration_settings(tmp_path: Path, redis_client: Redis) -> Settings:\n    _ = redis_client\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"mini_celery_integration.db\"\n    return Settings(\n        database_url=f\"sqlite:///{db_path.as_posix()}\",\n        redis_url=os.getenv(\"REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/15\"),\n        worker_queues=\"default\",\n        default_queue=\"default\",\n        visibility_timeout_sec=1,\n        reclaim_interval_sec=1,\n        scheduler_poll_interval_sec=0.2,\n    )\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "4b6b533390c8eebee3feea935357d6edf16145b9670580d65462d47990a160e5",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
